title: Ancestral WiFi
productionNotes: Open with deep Nyabinghi drums (funde, repeater, bass) establishing hypnotic foundation at 78 BPM. Layer in analog Moog bass on root note with slight portamento. Verse sections feature sparse arrangement—acoustic guitar one-drop on offbeats, sparse melodica counter-melodies. Introduce Hammond organ swells during chorus with spring reverb. Bridge section strips to drums and vocals with tape delay creating ancestral echo effect. Final chorus adds full roots reggae horns section (trumpet, trombone, sax). Throughout, maintain space for vocal clarity and mystical atmosphere—think early Burning Spear production with modern low-end weight.
intro:
Nyabinghi drums build for 8 bars, melodica whispers ancestral melody
[Spoken in deep patois over drums]
Dem tink Wi-Fi just invent yestahday
But Granny been transmittin' since she deh a yard pray
verse1:
Mi grandfather never own no cellular phone
But him message reach mi heart through blood and bone
Dem never have no Instagram fi show dem life
But every single day dem live was sacrifice

Now mi scrolling through di feed at tree o'clock
Searchin' fi connection but mi soul feellock
Den mi hear a voice inna di morning breeze
Same one weh guide dem through di stormy seas
prechorus:
Signal nah come from tower inna di sky
Come from di ground where yuh navel string lie
Password written inna yuh DNA strand
Just tune di frequency, yuh understand?
chorus:
Ancestral WiFi, unlimited data plan
Streaming from di source since di world began
Dem never need no router, dem never need no code
Just pure intention pon di ancient road

Ancestral WiFi, connection never drop
From di mountain peak straight down to di crop
Yuh searching fi di truth inna di cloud storage?
Check yuh grandmother wisdom, dat's di real coverage
verse2:
Dem survive di middle passage wid no GPS
Still find dem way to freedom through di wilderness
No Google Map coulda chart dat course
Just spirit navigation and ancestral force

Now wi drowning inna notification flood
Forgetting dat wi carry ancient knowing inna wi blood
Every time yuh pray, every time yuh meditate
Yuh logging into server dat will never terminate
bridge:
[Drums and vocals only, heavy echo]
Granny seh:
"Pickney, put down di phone, come sit wid mi
Mi nah 'pon Facebook but mi inna yuh memory
Every song mi sing, every story told
Dat's di original blockchain, digital gold"

[Full band returns]
So mi close mi eyes and mi start fi download
Centuries of wisdom pon dis earthly road
outro:
Di bandwidth unlimited when yuh tap di root
Ancestral server never need reboot
From Zion mountain to di valley low
Di signal strong everywhere yuh go

[Melodica and drums fade]
Still transmitting... still transmitting...
Through di ages... still transmitting...
promptForSuno: Mystical roots reggae, 78 BPM, F# minor, deep warm Jamaican baritone male vocals in authentic patois, hypnotic Nyabinghi drums foundation, funde repeater bass drums, sparse one-drop acoustic guitar offbeats, analog Moog bass synth, melodica counter-melodies, Hammond organ with spring reverb on chorus, roots reggae horn section finale, tape delay echo effects, spoken word intro, spiritual intergenerational dialogue, vintage Burning Spear production style, heavy bass weight, spacious mix, meditative groove, ancestral wisdom theme, traditional meets digital consciousness
